name: Customization Design Scope (MJS React)
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Understanding your customization options with the Merchant JavaScript Library helps you create search and merchandising experiences that align with your brand and customer expectations. When you can tailor product grids, autocomplete, filtering, and recommendations to match your specific needs, you can optimize how customers discover products and improve conversion rates through better-designed shopping experiences."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Comprehensive customization capabilities enable you to control every aspect of your search and product discovery interface. This helps ensure that your merchandising features not only function effectively but also provide engaging, on-brand experiences that guide customers toward relevant products and support your conversion optimization goals."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "#1. Purpose of this post"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify) is built to be versatile - ensuring the end result fits the merchant's unique requirements in terms of both functionality and brand tonality. An important component to achieve this is the front-end."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Merchandising Cloud can either be implemented through:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "An API integration: Utilizing our backend to power a tailored front-end."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A MJS integration: Utilizing our prebuilt front-end React library."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This post covers the endless opportunities to customize the MJS."}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Read more about our API integrationRead more about the API Integration or visit our API Library"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "#2. Overview of Assets"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Our MJS is installed with a full set of assets to power Personalized Search, Recommendations, and Smart Collections. The purpose of the Autocomplete is to nudge the shopper towards the search results page - which is why it's advised to keep it clean and only include functionality that is absolutely crucial.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Out of the box:", "bold": true}, {"text": "

Filtering & Sorting"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Orientation:", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Our filters work dynamically. That means that no option, or even full filter groups, will ever be shown if there are no corresponding products. The purpose of this is to never show empty options. It also means that the page isn't reloading to show the updated results. The filters are also running on a variant level, only displaying corresponding variants.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/2b0860e-Filter__Sorting.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/2b0860e-Filter__Sorting.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1474", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Our filters on Desktop, here displayed vertically.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/ceafbd1-Filter_Mobile.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/ceafbd1-Filter_Mobile.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1415", "width": 80}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Our filters on Mobile, here displayed with a Slide In - the most common option for mobile.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Out of the box:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Orientation:", "bold": true}, {"text": "By default, the filters are displayed vertically. ", "italic": true}, {"text": "Vertical ", "italic": true}, {"text": "orientation is the most widely used since it enables for a greater amount of filters. ", "italic": true}, {"text": "Horizontal", "italic": true}, {"text": " orientation is commonly applied since it allows more products to be displayed in the grid. ", "italic": true}, {"text": "Slide In Option", "italic": true}, {"text": " combines both benefits but gets one click further from the shopper.", "italic": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sorting Options:", "bold": true}, {"text": "By default, sorting options are displayed in the upper right corner and include the options: Popularity, What's New, Price H>L, Price L>H (Phrasing can be updated in the dashboard).", "italic": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sorting of Filter Options:", "bold": true}, {"text": "Size: from Smallest to Largest. Price: groups defined in dashboard. All other: by count of corresponding products.", "italic": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Selected Filter Behavior:", "bold": true}, {"text": "By default, the selected filter is moved to the top of the list and bolded (Numerical values in Size and Price excluded). We also advise adding breadcrumbs of selected filters (See below for reference).", "italic": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Shown Options:", "bold": true}, {"text": "By default, 6 filter options are shown. If more are available, a "+ More" option will appear and, when selected, will add a search box.", "italic": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open/Closed:", "bold": true}, {"text": " *By default, all filter groups are shown in open state.***"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Color Groups:", "bold": true}, {"text": "Combining similar colors into one group to reduce options.
